summary: Iteration 10 testing complete. Stock Management module and Kitchen page fully verified. All backend APIs working (16/16 tests passed). Frontend UI tested: Stock page with 4 tabs (Current Stock, Stock In Log, Usage Log, Item Master), Add Item dialog, Stock In dialog, branch filtering, and Kitchen page with item cart, +/- quantity controls, and Record Usage functionality.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with SSC@SSC.com/Aa147258369SsC@ returns access_token
Backend: GET /api/items returns items list
Backend: POST /api/items creates new item with cost_price, unit_price, unit, category, min_stock_level
Backend: POST /api/stock/entries creates stock entry with item_id, branch_id, quantity, unit_cost
Backend: GET /api/stock/entries returns stock entries filtered by branch_id
Backend: GET /api/stock/balance returns correct balance (stock_in - stock_used)
Backend: GET /api/stock/balance?branch_id filters by branch
Backend: POST /api/stock/usage/bulk creates multiple usage records
Backend: GET /api/stock/usage returns usage records
Backend: Low stock detection works (low_stock=true when balance <= min_stock_level)
Backend: Branches A and B exist with correct IDs
Frontend: Stock page loads with title 'Stock Management'
Frontend: Stock page has 4 tabs: Current Stock, Stock In Log, Usage Log, Item Master
Frontend: 'New Item' button opens Add Item dialog
Frontend: Add Item dialog has fields: name, category, cost_price, unit_price, unit selector, min_stock_level
Frontend: Item created appears in Item Master tab with all fields displayed correctly
Frontend: 'Stock In' button opens Stock In dialog
Frontend: Stock In dialog has fields: item selector, branch selector, quantity, unit_cost, supplier, date, notes
Frontend: Stock entry appears in Stock In Log tab
Frontend: Current Stock tab shows balance with columns: Item, Unit, Stock In, Used, Balance, Avg Cost, Value, Status
Frontend: Branch filter dropdown works to filter stock by branch
Frontend: 'Scan Invoice' button is visible (OCR feature UI present)
Frontend: Kitchen page loads with title 'Kitchen'
Frontend: Kitchen page shows 'Select your branch' message before branch selection
Frontend: Kitchen branch selector shows available branches
Frontend: Kitchen shows Available Items as cards with +/- quantity controls
Frontend: Kitchen cart shows 'Today's Usage' with selected items and quantities
Frontend: Kitchen 'Record Usage' button submits bulk usage via POST /api/stock/usage/bulk
Frontend: Kitchen usage reduces stock balance correctly
Frontend: Kitchen 'Recent Usage' section shows usage history
Frontend: Navigation sidebar shows Stock and Kitchen items
critical_code_review_comments: Item model correctly includes cost_price, unit_price, unit, category, min_stock_level fields
StockEntry model correctly tracks item_id, item_name, branch_id, quantity, unit_cost, supplier_id, source, date
StockUsage model correctly tracks item_id, branch_id, quantity, used_by for kitchen usage
Stock balance calculation (stock_in - stock_used) is correctly implemented
Low stock detection works when balance <= min_stock_level
Kitchen page correctly filters items by selected branch and shows available quantities
Bulk usage API correctly creates multiple usage records in one request
data-testid attributes are properly implemented for all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: Test items 'TEST Chicken Breast' and 'TEST Rice' were created and cleaned up during testing. Stock entries and usage records for test items also created and cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 complete. Stock Management module and Kitchen page fully tested. Key features: 1) Stock page (/stock) has 4 tabs - Current Stock shows balance, Stock In Log shows entries, Usage Log shows kitchen usage, Item Master shows all items. 2) Items have fields: name, cost_price, unit_price, unit, category, min_stock_level. 3) Stock entries track item_id, branch_id, quantity, unit_cost. 4) Kitchen page (/kitchen) shows items as cards with +/- buttons, cart shows 'Today's Usage', Record Usage button submits bulk usage. 5) Each branch has its own stock - stock balance is calculated per branch. 6) Invoice OCR (POST /api/stock/scan-invoice) button exists but requires real image and EMERGENT_LLM_KEY - skip testing this directly. Branch IDs: A=d805e6cb-f65a-4a09-8707-95f3f5e505bf, b=4ea291a5-c3e4-4067-8437-2121f3c12882.
